detail.instructions: Replace the TODO with ParseUserError variants for the parser cases below: MissingId, MissingName, MissingEmail, and InvalidId.

hints.body: The parser already names every failure case it wants to return.
Each distinct failure mode should usually become its own enum variant.
Keep these as programmatic enum variants; human-facing text comes later with Display.

detail.completionExplanation: Each parser failure now has a named enum variant. Empty fields and invalid IDs become typed results that callers can match on instead of parsing strings or comparing error messages.
